channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A robot that swims the seas and soars the skies
item.description: Inspired by diving birds, roboticists built lightweight machines that transition from water to air, potentially leading to robots for monitoring.

item.title: Outdoor access for disabled in Vermont
item.description: Mountain bike enthusiasts have spent years working on an ambitious 485-mile multi-use trail called The Velomont that will span the state.

item.title: Strategies for managing fluctuating gas prices
item.description: Gas prices have been volatile since the U.S. and Israel initiated a conflict with Iran, disrupting shipping through the Strait of Hormuz and affecting consumers.

item.title: Class action lawsuit against AI companies over deepfake child abuse images expands
item.description: New plaintiffs allege that AI tools from SpaceXAI and Stability AI were used to create explicit images of minors.
